title: Skol applies AL and Atk plus four while equipped

plan.title: Skol applies AL and Atk plus four while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Skol to a primary creature and verify the printed AL and Atk bonuses.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the bonuses come only from Skol.

steps: Player 1 plays Skol and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle and inspect damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +4 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm both bonuses apply only while Skol remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses effective AL and battle damage output.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
